hint: Like the Apollo AGC engineers: (1) A' = A NOR A, (2) B' = B NOR B, (3) R = A NOR B = (A+B)', (4) S = A' NOR B' = (A'·B'→AB by De Morgan), (5) XOR = R NOR S.
title: XOR from NOR Only
objective: Build XOR using only NOR gates
description: The Apollo Guidance Computer was built entirely from NOR gates. You already built a Half Adder from NOR (the Apollo challenge). Now build the XOR function — the heart of addition — using only NOR gates. This is how NASA's engineers computed in 1969.
